description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, docker, and deploy, and define variables APP_NAME, REPO, USER_EMAIL, USER_GITLAB, USER_NAME, SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE, SPRING_PROFILES_HEROKU_ACTIVE, and DOCKER_DRIVER. In the build stage add a maven-build job that uses the maven:3-jdk-8 image, runs mvn package -B, and stores the resulting JAR files matching target/*.jar as artifacts. In the docker stage add a container job that runs only on the master branch, is manual, uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service, and executes docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com, docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/yogonza524/$REPO ., and docker push registry.gitlab.com/yogonza524/$REPO to publish the image. In the deploy stage add a heroku-deploy job that also runs only on master and is manual, uses the yogonza524/debian-heroku:1.2 image, and runs sed -i -- 's/USER_EMAIL/$USER_EMAIL/g' ci/heroku.txt, sed -i -- 's/HEROKU_API_KEY/$HEROKU_API_KEY/g' ci/heroku.txt, cp ci/heroku.txt ~/.netrc, git remote add heroku https://heroku:$HEROKU_API_KEY@git.heroku.com/$APP_NAME.git, and git push -f heroku master to deploy to Heroku.
